_comment: Per-scenario pass-rate floors read by scripts/eval_scenarios.py (load_scenario_floors -> abstract_eval.per_scenario_floor). A floor blocks the eval (exit 1) when that scenario's pass-rate drops below it, independent of the overall mean. WHY THIS FILE EXISTS: without it, floor enforcement is silently disabled. THESE ARE INITIAL VALUES, NOT CALIBRATED. They were set without a real eval run (needs the 'anthropic' package + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, unavailable when authored). After the first full baseline run (e.g. `python3 scripts/eval_scenarios.py --runs 5`), set each floor from observed pass-rates and raise the hard-contract scenarios toward 1.0 once confirmed they pass 3/3 under `--runs 3`.

_scenarios.1: Self-Review Must Not Use Light Path
_scenarios.28: Repeated Optimization Loops Need A Behavior Delta
_scenarios.29: Discovery Metadata Must Match Skill Behavior
_scenarios.30: Actionability Gate Must Reject Hidden Decisions
_scenarios.32: Subagent Lens-Roles Need Explicit Request And Independent Scope
